00000006831845868630.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831845868647.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831845868647.skuDescription: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes Fresh Scent 75 Count 15949

00000006831845868647.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831845868647.skuDescription: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes Fresh Scent 75 Count 15949

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831849885114.title: Brother TN-850 Black Toner High Yield Cartridge, 2/Pack (TN8502PK)

paragraph: Brother TN8502PK black toner cartridges produce crisp, sharp prints that withstand the test of time. Intelligently engineered to work in seamless unison with your Brother printer, these toner cartridges offer professional mono laser print quality you can consistently rely on for up to 8000 pages*.
bullets: Compatible with Brother DCP-L5500DN, DCP-L5600DN, DCP-L5650DN, HL-L5000D, HL-L5100DN, HL-L5200DW, HL-L5200DWT, HL-L6200DW, HL-L6200DWT, HL-L6250DW, HL-L6300DW, HL-L6400DW, HL-L6400DWT, MFC-L5700DW, MFC-L5800DW, MFC-L5850DW, MFC-L5900DW, MFC-L6700DW, MFC-L6750DW, MFC-L6800DW, MFC-L6900DW
Page Yield of up to 8,000 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine TN8502PK High-Yield 2 Pack Black Ink Cartridges.
Brother Genuine Multi-Pack Toner TN8502PK High-Yield Black Toner Cartridges.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19752 (letter/A4).
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Expect high-quality results for home and office documents with this printer paper. This 20 lb. weight paper is engineered to prevent jamming, making it ideal for use in all machines. Featuring 3600 sheets, this Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper provides the right amount to keep up with your daily demand.
bullets: Copy printer paper that is best for high volume, black & white printing

Brightness rating of 92 for sharp, clear print results
White paper with a Matte finish
600 sheets per ream, 6 reams per carton, 3600 sheets total
Paper is acid-free to prevent crumbling or yellowing
Engineered to prevent jamming
Designed for high-speed printers
headliner: Keep your copy room stocked with this 6-ream carton of Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper to handle everyday printing.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831854142776.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Pick up instructions
Print your shipping label.
Package your items using the original box or any package suitable for shipping and affix the shipping label to the outside of the box.
Insert packing slip inside the package with the item being returned.

Wait for pickup. Your item(s) will be picked up within 1 to 5 business days after your return was submitted between the hours of 9am and 5pm. You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831858177460.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.

Keep product and use at your discretion or

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Pick up instructions
Print your shipping label.
Package your items using the original box or any package suitable for shipping and affix the shipping label to the outside of the box.
Insert packing slip inside the package with the item being returned.

Wait for pickup. Your item(s) will be picked up within 1 to 5 business days after your return was submitted between the hours of 9am and 5pm. You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831861795149.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831955269464.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831955269464.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831956000837.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 88/Carton (400845)

paragraph: Enjoy traditional coffee shop flavor with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods. The medium-roast beans deliver a rich, smooth taste, and the K-Cup format lets you brew coffee one mug at a time. This 88-count package, makes them ideal for stocking break rooms, office kitchens and reception areas.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
88 K-Cups per carton
Orthodox Union Kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Give staff and guests a delicious beverage option with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods.
expandedDescr: INTRODUCING RECYCLABLE* K-CUP PODS: Simple. Delicious. And now Recyclable. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done just peel, empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in all communities. Packaging may vary.

00000006832036262305.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 88/Carton (400845)

paragraph: Enjoy traditional coffee shop flavor with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods. The medium-roast beans deliver a rich, smooth taste, and the K-Cup format lets you brew coffee one mug at a time. This 88-count package, makes them ideal for stocking break rooms, office kitchens and reception areas.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
88 K-Cups per carton
Orthodox Union Kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Give staff and guests a delicious beverage option with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods.
expandedDescr: INTRODUCING RECYCLABLE* K-CUP PODS: Simple. Delicious. And now Recyclable. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done just peel, empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in all communities. Packaging may vary.

00000006832036262305.skuDescription: Dunkin Original Blend Coffee Keurig KCup Pods Medium Roast 88Carton 400845

00000006831960192245.title: Coastwide Professional™ 20" Toilet Plunger, Black (CW60568)

paragraph: Maintain a clean, functional bathroom at your workplace with this black toilet plunger. The rubber head creates a tight seal for optimal pressure to remove tough clogs. This Coastwide Professional black toilet plunger works on sinks or toilets for versatility, and the durable construction stands up to the rigors of frequent use.
bullets: Toilet plunger for both sinks or toilets
Features an iron handle with a black rubber head
Length: 20"
Pull out extended rubber head to create tight seal when plunging to remove tough clogs
Iron handle provides a firm grip when plunging
headliner: Unclog toilets and drains in commercial facilities with this Coastwide Professional black toilet plunger.
expandedDescr: Toilet plunger suitable for both sinks and toilets. For toilet use, please make sure to flip out the extension rubber inside the plunger head before using — this provides maximum suction to clear clogs effectively.

00000006831960192245.skuDescription: Coastwide Professional 20 Toilet Plunger Black CW60568

00000006831956056315.title: Coastwide Professional™ J-Series Duo Bath Tissue Dispenser, Black/Metallic (CWJ2BT-S)

paragraph: Keep public restrooms stocked with this two-roll bath tissue dispenser. Color-coded interior touchpoints offer easy access, so janitorial staff can refill restrooms quickly.  A sliding door on this dispenser provides access to the second roll only after the first roll is empty, helping prevent cross-contamination. This Coastwide Professional™ J-Series duo bath tissue dispenser holds up to 3,000 sheets of two-ply or 6,000 sheets of one-ply J-Series bath tissue.
bullets: Convenient horizontal bath tissue dispenser adds a touch of sophistication to any restroom
Holds two rolls of bathroom tissue
Comes in black with metallic finish
Dimensions: 7.55"H x 11.49"W x 6.90"D
A sliding door limits access to new roll until first roll is depleted and minimizes contamination
Engineered to work with J-Series bath tissue for the best performance with dispenser
Intuitive, color-coded components for easy replenishment
10-year manufacturer limited warranty
Universal key works with all dispensers in the J-Series so janitors only need to carry one key around
Explore our entire J-series dispenser solution
headliner: Equip restroom stalls with this Coastwide Professional™ J-Series duo bath tissue dispenser to reduce refills and run-outs.

00000006831956056315.skuDescription: Coastwide Professional JSeries Duo Bath Tissue Dispenser BlackMetallic CWJ2BTS

00000006831956056322.title: Coastwide Professional™ 20" Toilet Plunger, Black (CW60568)

paragraph: Maintain a clean, functional bathroom at your workplace with this black toilet plunger. The rubber head creates a tight seal for optimal pressure to remove tough clogs. This Coastwide Professional black toilet plunger works on sinks or toilets for versatility, and the durable construction stands up to the rigors of frequent use.
bullets: Toilet plunger for both sinks or toilets
Features an iron handle with a black rubber head
Length: 20"
Pull out extended rubber head to create tight seal when plunging to remove tough clogs
Iron handle provides a firm grip when plunging
headliner: Unclog toilets and drains in commercial facilities with this Coastwide Professional black toilet plunger.
expandedDescr: Toilet plunger suitable for both sinks and toilets. For toilet use, please make sure to flip out the extension rubber inside the plunger head before using — this provides maximum suction to clear clogs effectively.

paragraph: Enjoy traditional coffee shop flavor with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods. The medium-roast beans deliver a rich, smooth taste, and the K-Cup format lets you brew coffee one mug at a time. This 88-count package, makes them ideal for stocking break rooms, office kitchens and reception areas.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
88 K-Cups per carton
Orthodox Union Kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Give staff and guests a delicious beverage option with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods.
expandedDescr: INTRODUCING RECYCLABLE* K-CUP PODS: Simple. Delicious. And now Recyclable. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done just peel, empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in all communities. Packaging may vary.

00000006831956056315.title: Coastwide Professional™ J-Series Duo Bath Tissue Dispenser, Black/Metallic (CWJ2BT-S)

paragraph: Keep public restrooms stocked with this two-roll bath tissue dispenser. Color-coded interior touchpoints offer easy access, so janitorial staff can refill restrooms quickly.  A sliding door on this dispenser provides access to the second roll only after the first roll is empty, helping prevent cross-contamination. This Coastwide Professional™ J-Series duo bath tissue dispenser holds up to 3,000 sheets of two-ply or 6,000 sheets of one-ply J-Series bath tissue.
bullets: Convenient horizontal bath tissue dispenser adds a touch of sophistication to any restroom
Holds two rolls of bathroom tissue
Comes in black with metallic finish
Dimensions: 7.55"H x 11.49"W x 6.90"D
A sliding door limits access to new roll until first roll is depleted and minimizes contamination
Engineered to work with J-Series bath tissue for the best performance with dispenser
Intuitive, color-coded components for easy replenishment
10-year manufacturer limited warranty
Universal key works with all dispensers in the J-Series so janitors only need to carry one key around
Explore our entire J-series dispenser solution
headliner: Equip restroom stalls with this Coastwide Professional™ J-Series duo bath tissue dispenser to reduce refills and run-outs.

00000006831956056315.skuDescription: Coastwide Professional JSeries Duo Bath Tissue Dispenser BlackMetallic CWJ2BTS

Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

paragraph: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source.
bullets: Quiet and Aware Modes
Dynamic Mic Mixing for Clear Calls
Bluetooth 5.3 Connectivity, Up to 30'
Supports SimpleSync and Bose Music App
Immersive, Spatial Audio Mode
Passive and Active Noise Cancellation
IPX4-Rated Water and Sweat Resistance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling In-Ear Earbuds
expandedDescr: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

bullets: Create labels for home, work, or school with this 0.5" wide & 13' yield label tape
Black print on clear tape for legibility
Compatible with: LetraTag LT-100H, LT-100T, Plus LT-100T, QX50

00000006831991544648.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

dummyKey.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

dummyKey.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

dummyKey.title: Coastwide Professional™ 36" Lobby Broom, Gray (CW61069-CC)

paragraph: Invite clients and office guests to a clean space with this gray lobby broom. The 8-inch bristle width and small height are perfect for one-handed use and work well with lobby dustpans for efficient cleaning. Featuring chemical-resistant polyethylene terephthalate bristles, this Coastwide Professional gray lobby broom is suitable for general cleaning, and the split ends trap dust for a spotless office.
bullets: Lobby broom for easy and effective indoor cleaning
36" height and 8" bristle width for one-handed use; enables use with lobby dustpan for efficient cleaning
Comes in gray and made of polyethylene terephthalate
Perfect for cleaning
Angled bristles are great for sweeping in corners and other hard-to-sweep areas
headliner: Sweep dirt and dust off the floor with this Coastwide Professional gray lobby broom.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000009250004010523.title: Coastwide Professional™ 36" Lobby Broom, Gray (CW61069-CC)

paragraph: Invite clients and office guests to a clean space with this gray lobby broom. The 8-inch bristle width and small height are perfect for one-handed use and work well with lobby dustpans for efficient cleaning. Featuring chemical-resistant polyethylene terephthalate bristles, this Coastwide Professional gray lobby broom is suitable for general cleaning, and the split ends trap dust for a spotless office.
bullets: Lobby broom for easy and effective indoor cleaning
36" height and 8" bristle width for one-handed use; enables use with lobby dustpan for efficient cleaning
Comes in gray and made of polyethylene terephthalate
Perfect for cleaning
Angled bristles are great for sweeping in corners and other hard-to-sweep areas
headliner: Sweep dirt and dust off the floor with this Coastwide Professional gray lobby broom.

00000006831997238596.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

00000006831997238596.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831997236660.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831997238664.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831998069045.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000004720002908111.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831998068284.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000004720002909915.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831998068963.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000004720002907480.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831998068291.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000004720002909491.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

00000006831998061094.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

00000006831998063593.title: PNY Attaché 3 16GB USB 2.0 Type A Flash Drive, Black (P-FD16GATT3-BG)

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​
bullets: The durable, light-weight design of the Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential mobile storage solution
The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use
The key loop allows for the USB flash drive to easily attach to key chains, so important files are never out of reach
Compatible with most PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers with USB 2.0 ports
Compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at USB 2.0 speeds
headliner: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school.

paragraph: The PNY Attaché 3 USB 2.0 16GB Flash Drive is the essential solution for storing and sharing digital content for work and school. Durable and light-weight, it delivers the perfect combination of storage and convenience. The sliding collar, and cap-less design protects your important content when not in use, and the included key loop easily attaches to key chains, so important files are never out of reach. The Attaché 3 USB 2.0 Flash Drive is compatible with USB 2.0 equipped PC and Mac laptop and desktop computers, and compatible with USB 3.0 host devices at standard USB 2.0 speeds.​

paragraph: Scott Essential provides reliable balance of efficiency, performance, and value. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper gives your office a reliable washroom experience and allows fewer refills, less waste, and easy maintenance. As a coreless bath tissue with high-capacity features, each roll is nearly 50% longer than our standard roll bath tissue. As an environmentally friendly toilet tissue, it eliminates the cardboard core and paper wrap. This product meets or exceeds EPA guidelines for minimum post-consumer waste content, is ECOLOGO and FSC certified; FSC mix paper supporting responsible forestry. It can be used in most coreless toilet paper commercial dispensers. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper is compatible with the Kimberly-Clark Professional ICON dispensing system with interchangeable faceplate technology.
bullets: 1,000 Sheets/Roll; 36 Rolls of Scott Essential Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper/Case; 36,000 Sheets/Case; 2-Ply; White
This 2-Ply Scott Essential coreless toilet paper is efficient with fewer refills, less waste, and easy maintenance
Each bath tissue roll is nearly 50% longer than our standard roll bathroom tissue with 100% core and paper wrap elimination
Compatible with the Kimberly-Clark Professional ICON dispensing system
ECOLOGO and FSC certified; FSC mix paper supporting responsible forestry; Meets or exceeds EPA guidelines for post-consumer waste content

paragraph: The dish scrubbing wand also features a built-in scraper to cut through stuck-on food messes. Use these tough heavy duty dishwands for cleaning grease, grime, and dirt on safe-to-use surfaces such as uncoated cookware, oven racks, concrete, and tools. The scrubbing fibers of this dish scrub wand are made from 100% recycled content for a sustainable clean. For an easy refresh, simply put the dishwand in the dishwasher top rack to sanitize and reuse. This cleaning wand will work with all Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills. Scotch-Brite cleaning supplies give you the power to quickly clean up life’s everyday messes — that’s why we’re America’s #1 selling dishwand brand.
bullets: ONE SCRUBBING DISH WAND: This pack includes one Scotch-Brite Heavy Duty Dishwand
3X SCRUBBING POWER: These heavy duty sponge wands offer 3X scrubbing power* to take on everyday grease, grime, and messes with ease
PERFECT FOR TOUGH JOBS: They’re the perfect sponge wands for cleaning uncoated pots and pans, grates, oven racks, outdoor grills, and more
CONVENIENT DESIGN: The dishwand dispenses dish soap, includes a built-in scraper for stuck-on food, and stands upright for cleaner storage and faster drying
SANITIZE UP TO 20X: Sanitize and clean these dishwands in the dishwasher up to 20X
MADE FROM RECYCLED CONTENT: The scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled plastic for a sustainable clean
REFILL & REUSE: Make your dishwand go further by easily replacing the scrubbing head with Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills
AMERICA’S #1 DISHWAND BRAND: Committed to quality and satisfaction, known for innovation in cleaning tools, and trusted for 65 years** (**2023 IPSOS Brand Health)
headliner: Experience a gratifying clean with the Scotch-Brite Heavy Duty Dishwand. This soap dispensing dishwand provides heavy duty power for tough messes while keeping your hands out of the mess.

The scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled content for a sustainable clean. To clean, simply put the dishwand head you are using in the dishwasher top rack to sanitize and reuse it. paragraph: Keep your dishes clean and your hands out of the water with the Scotch-Brite Soap Control Non-Scratch Scrub Dots Dishwand, from America's No. 1 selling dishwand brand. This long-lasting dish sponge with soap dispenser handle features 3x the scrubbing power* to take down everyday messes with ease. Offering precise soap control with the push of a button, this dish scrubber dispenses the right amount of dish soap exactly where and when you need it. Say goodbye to soap spills for good thanks to the leak-free guarantee and innovative valve that keeps dish soap from leaking, no matter how you store your scrub sponge wand. The soft-touch surface provides a non-slip grip, and the built-in scraper helps remove stuck-on foods. This non-scratch cleaning sponge is safe to use on dishes, non-stick cookware, countertops, tubs and showers, and more. Plus, it resists odors and rinses clean – even eggs and cheese won’t stick to this easy-to-clean kitchen sponge with handle. Just fill it with your favorite dish soap, and effortlessly wipe away grease and grime. The Scotch-Brite Soap Control Non-Scratch Scrub Dots Dishwand is durable, reusable and top shelf dishwasher safe, with scrubbing fibers made from 75% recycled content.

PRECISE SOAP CONTROL: Dispenses the right amount of dish soap exactly where and when you need it, offering precise soap control with the push of a button
REFILL & REUSE: Make your dishwand go further by easily replacing the scrubbing head with Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills
AMERICA’S #1 SPONGE BRAND: Committed to quality and satisfaction, known for innovation in cleaning tools, and trusted for 65 years (2023 IPSOS Brand Health)

headliner: Keep your dishes clean and your hands out of the water with the Scotch-Brite Soap Control Non-Scratch Scrub Dots Dishwand, from America's No. 1 selling dishwand brand.
expandedDescr: Keep your hands out of the mess with the Scotch-Brite™ Odor Resist Non-Scratch Soap Control Dishwand. This non-scratch cleaning wand delivers gentle, effective cleaning on everyday messes and is safe for non-stick cookware and other household surfaces. The built-in scraper removes stuck-on food, while the push-button dispenses the right amount of dish soap every time. On the non-slip grip handle, a leak-free valve keeps soap contained, while the upgraded base allows the standing dish wand to remain upright between uses for a cleaner sink area and faster drying. When it’s time to change the scrubbing head, simply push the tab to release, slide off the refill, and click on a new one. Scotch-Brite™ cleaning supplies give you the power to quickly clean up life’s everyday messes — that’s why we’re America’s #1 selling dishwand brand. *This Scotch-Brite® cleaning tool contains an antimicrobial agent in the scrubber pad that protects the product from bacterial odors. Product does not protect users or others from food-borne or disease-causing bacteria. Clean thoroughly after each use.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006832007011789.title: Sharpie Magnum Tank Permanent Marker, Chisel Tip, Black, 12/Pack (44001A)

paragraph: Create notes that last with the fade-resistant, water-resistant ink in these permanent markers. The chisel tips are extra wide, so you can easily make bold, highly-visible lines, and the aluminum barrels stand up to rough handling. These Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers come in a box of 12, making it simple to supply them to multiple workers at once.
bullets: Permanent ink formula is designed to last
Black ink markers are indispensable office supplies
Extra wide jumbo chisel tip
A dozen markers per pack
As these markers are non-toxic, they are extremely safe to use
headliner: Write notes on wood, stone, leather, and other surfaces easily with this box of 12 Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers.
expandedDescr: Safety Data Sheet
