00000006832007011789.title: Sharpie Permanent Marker, Ultra Fine Tip, Assorted, 12/Pack (37175PP)

paragraph: This Sharpie set offers a wealth of ink colors for a personalized writing experience. These Sharpie ultra fine point permanent markers feature waterproof, smear-proof and fade-resistant ink. Each permanent marker will write on most surfaces.
bullets: Permanent, waterproof, pen-style marker
Marks metal, glass, plastics, foils, rubber, cloth, waxed paper and more
Quick-drying, AP certified non-toxic ink formula
12-color set includes black, blue, red, green, brown, orange, purple, yellow, aqua, berry, lime and turquoise
Ink dries instantly
Intensely brilliant colors create eye-popping, vibrant impressions
Endlessly versatile ultra-fine point is perfect for countless uses in the classroom, office, home and beyond
headliner: Use these Sharpie ultra fine point permanent markers for labeling, addressing and more. Assorted markers come in a Sharpie set of one dozen.
expandedDescr: Create bold, detailed lines on signs, files and labels with this Sharpie assorted 12-color ultra-fine point permanent marker set. Coming in an assortment of colors, this marker's ink is quick drying and non-toxic, making it safe for use around children. Plus, it's designed to be water and smudge proof as well as fade resistant to ensure a lasting impression on virtually any surface.This marker's ultra-fine point offers a consistent stroke width that's perfect for writing or filling in small details. While the barrel provides a comfortable grip, its incorporated cap clip allows you to secure the marker to folders for quick, convenient access. Label and mark up papers with ease with this Sharpie marker.

dummyKeySTORE.title: Sharpie Stick Highlighter, Chisel Tip, Yellow, 4/Pack (1770695)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: No highlighter shines as bright. Perfect for when info is high priority and precision is a must, the Sharpie pocket highlighter makes everything highly visible. This versatile highlighter is designed to fit effortlessly in your pocket or clip to your shirt, so it's easy to take with you anywhere. With brilliant, transparent quick-drying ink and an easy gliding chisel tip that highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text, this Sharpie highlighter makes your most important thoughts and notes jump off the page. It's no wonder why Sharpie is a must-have highlighter for travel itineraries, camping checklists, escape plans, and the rest of life's major high points.
bullets: Easy to control, light on your hands, and easy to store, this super slim stick highlighter is perfect for all-day study sessions
Chisel tip highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text
Vivid, high-contrast yellow ink adds colorful emphasis
User-friendly, quick-drying, and odorless AP certified formula
Pocket clip-on cap keeps the highlighter within easy reach
Four highlighters per pack
Smear Guard ink technology resists smearing of many pen and marker inks (let the ink dry before highlighting)
Meets or exceeds the ACMI and AP standards

paragraph: No highlighter shines as bright. Perfect for when info is high priority and precision is a must, the Sharpie pocket highlighter makes everything highly visible. This versatile highlighter is designed to fit effortlessly in your pocket or clip to your shirt, so it's easy to take with you anywhere. With brilliant, transparent quick-drying ink and an easy gliding chisel tip that highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text, this Sharpie highlighter makes your most important thoughts and notes jump off the page. It's no wonder why Sharpie is a must-have highlighter for travel itineraries, camping checklists, escape plans, and the rest of life's major high points.
bullets: Easy to control, light on your hands, and easy to store, this super slim stick highlighter is perfect for all-day study sessions
Chisel tip highlights and underlines both wide and narrow lines of text
Vivid, high-contrast yellow ink adds colorful emphasis
User-friendly, quick-drying, and odorless AP certified formula
Pocket clip-on cap keeps the highlighter within easy reach
Four highlighters per pack
Smear Guard ink technology resists smearing of many pen and marker inks (let the ink dry before highlighting)
Meets or exceeds the ACMI and AP standards

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

imageAltTexts: Staples Plus Membership~#|#~sp49441579_sc7
dummyKeyMEMBERSHIP_PROGRAM.title: Staples Plus Membership

bullets: Free delivery no minimum. Exclusions apply.
$35.99 paper – everyday.
10% back in rewards on ink & toner.
Guaranteed lowest prices on your 5 favorites.
headliner: Big Savings for Small Business
expandedDescr: Once enrolled as a Staples Plus member, your new paid membership benefits replace any savings you may have received as an existing rewards program member (up to and including instant savings or rewards savings benefits). Your business exclusive pricing and custom picks are available in store and online (subject to product availability and selection) – simply reference your Rewards member number when shopping. Members have a quantity limit of 20 units per selected item per calendar month at their special pricing rate. Members have the option to change 1 one of their 5 specially priced items every 90 days.
